title: Real-Time Feedback and Adaptive Control
description: Master the design and implementation of real-time feedback systems for quantum computing. Learn about mid-circuit measurements, active qubit reset, error detection feedback, and the latency constraints that make quantum feedback uniquely challenging.
learningObjectives: Design feedback loops that operate within qubit coherence time constraints
Implement active qubit reset using measurement feedback
Analyze latency budgets for mid-circuit measurement and conditional operations
Apply classical feedback for quantum error detection and correction
Evaluate the trade-offs between feedback speed and measurement fidelity
